relationships.context: V follows a structured six-phase daily routine from wake through bedtime
Taken post-workout as part of Phase 3
Taken in evening Phase 5 around 6 PM
Taken at bedtime as part of Phase 6
Taken at bedtime alongside Aripiprazole in Phase 6
Single main meal consumed around 9 AM with food-dependent supplements
Timeline is documented as part of V's broader bio-context health profile
